emailAccounts.title: Email accounts
emailAccounts.subtitle: Connect the inboxes you want to send outreach from.

landing.badge: AI-powered outbound that actually gets replies
landing.heroSub: Generate personalized cold emails and follow-ups for every lead in seconds. No templates. No research. Just hit send.
landing.noCard: No credit card required · Free forever up to 10 leads
landing.howTitle: From lead list to booked meeting in 3 steps
landing.howSub: No complex setup. No learning curve. Just results.
landing.step1Desc: Paste or type your leads with their company, role, and any context you have.
landing.step2Desc: AI writes a unique cold email + two follow-ups tailored to each lead.
landing.step3Desc: Copy the emails, paste into your outreach tool, and start booking meetings.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to scale outbound
landing.featuresSub: From lead import to personalized sequences — one workflow, zero busywork.
landing.f1Desc: Generate unique emails for every lead based on their company, role, and background — no templates needed.
landing.f2Desc: Outreach that's actually relevant gets opened, read, and replied to.
landing.f3Desc: Stop researching and writing manually. MailLead.ai does the heavy lifting so you can focus on closing.
landing.f4Desc: Manage campaigns, leads, and sequences in one place — whether you're a founder or a 50-person sales team.
landing.f5Desc: See all your campaigns and generated outreach from a single dashboard.
landing.f6Desc: Get a cold email plus two follow-ups generated for every single lead.
landing.quote1: We used to spend 3 hours writing emails for 10 leads. MailLead.ai does it in under a minute — and the reply rates are actually better.
landing.quote2: Our team booked 40% more meetings in the first month. The personalization is so good, prospects think we spent hours on each email.
landing.ctaTitle: Your competitors are already personalizing. Are you?
landing.ctaSub: Join hundreds of teams already using MailLead.ai to book more meetings.
landing.mobileCta: Try free — no credit card needed

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to scale.
pricing.starterDesc: Try it free — no credit card needed
pricing.growthNote: That's less than one sales rep's hourly cost

faqs.a: Yes — cancel anytime from your settings. No questions asked. If you're on Growth, you'll keep access until the end of your billing period.

faqs.q: What happens when I hit the free limit?
faqs.a: You can still view your existing campaigns and emails. To generate more outreach or create new campaigns, you'll need to upgrade to Growth.

faqs.q: Do you store my lead data?
faqs.a: Yes, your leads are stored securely so you can access your campaigns anytime. We never share or sell your data.

faqs.q: Can I try Growth features before paying?
faqs.a: The Starter plan gives you full access to the core AI engine. Growth simply removes the limits so you can scale.

auth.loginSub: Log in to your MailLead.ai account

leads.mapColumns: Map your columns to lead fields

builder.title: Build your sequence
builder.subtitle: Write your emails and follow-ups. Use variables to personalize each message per lead.
builder.needBody: Add at least one email with a body before continuing.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Choose when and how often the sequence sends emails.
schedule.pauseOnReplyDesc: Stop further follow-ups for any lead who replies.

sending.title: Sending
sending.subtitle: Pick which inboxes to send from and set per-account daily limits.
sending.recommended: Recommended: 25 emails per account per day for best deliverability.
sending.warning: Sending more than 50 emails per day per account can hurt your deliverability and risk your inbox being flagged.
sending.estimate: With {{leads}} leads across {{accounts}} account(s) at {{limit}}/day, this campaign will take ~{{days}} day(s).
sending.needSender: Select at least one sender account.

import.title: Import leads from file
import.desc: Upload a CSV or Excel file. Required column: <0>email</0>. Optional: name, company, role, website, linkedin, notes.
import.fileTypes: CSV, XLSX, or XLS · max 2 MB
import.noRows: No valid rows found. Make sure your file has an 'email' column.
import.importedPartial: Imported {{imported}} of {{total}} leads. Upgrade to import the rest.

upgrade.subtext: Unlock unlimited campaigns, leads, and AI generations
